body.title: CLOSED: Remove _ensure_utility_closet_running from Igor boot
body.result: _ensure_utility_closet_running() removed from main.py; 54-line method + call site deleted; tests pass; commit 33712d3a
body.description:
Igor's boot sequence launches the UC server if it isn't running (_ensure_utility_closet_running at main.py:1312-1365, called at line 749). This belongs to agent_datacenter now. Remove the call at line 749 and the entire method. Igor should connect to whatever is on port 8080 but not be responsible for starting it.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/main.py (lines 748-749, 1312-1365)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; safeguards (main.py HIGH inertia — pre-approved for this migration)
**Scope boundary:** In scope: remove _ensure_utility_closet_running() call and method body. Leave uc_client.register/stats/deregister for now (Igor still connects, just doesn't launch). Out of scope: removing all UC wiring from Igor (separate ticket).
**Test plan:** Boot Igor with no UC server running — Igor should NOT try to launch utility_closet_server.py. Igor should log a warning if UC is unavailable but continue running.
